transcript: You've crossed the border by now. Do you have any idea the kind of trouble you're in, O'Connor? I was doing my job. You're the first bad guy you helped escape the law's grasp. As of now, you're being taken off active duty until the service can mount a formal inquiry. What about Braga? That's no longer your concern. We now know where Braga is, right? Customs tracked him via satellite to his home base in Ticali, Mexico Mexico is out of our jurisdiction The fact is Brass will be so busy holding press conferences over the seizure We'll skate under the radar Thank you for watching. the fact is brass will be so busy holding press conferences over the seizure we'll skate under the radar i thought we signed on to do the right thing I don't know. Thank you.
